sql_insert_projects_s3^s3:
INSERT INTO projects(account_id, code, budget, archived) VALUES
  ((SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = 'Acme'), 'API', 120, 0),
  ((SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = 'Acme'), 'WEB', 80, 0),
  ((SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE name = 'Globex'), 'OPS', 60, 0);
sql_insert_tasks_s3^s3:
INSERT INTO tasks(project_id, title, points, status) VALUES
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'API'), 'design schema', 5, 'done'),
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'API'), 'ship backend', 8, 'in_progress'),
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'WEB'), 'draft docs', 3, 'todo'),
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'WEB'), 'landing page', 4, 'done'),
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'OPS'), 'rotate keys', 2, 'todo'),
  ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'OPS'), 'audit trail', 6, 'in_review');
sql_insert_events_s3^s3:
INSERT INTO task_events(task_id, kind, delta) VALUES
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'design schema'), 'estimate', 3),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'design schema'), 'bonus', 1),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'ship backend'), 'estimate', 5),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'ship backend'), 'rework', -2),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'draft docs'), 'estimate', 1),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'landing page'), 'estimate', 2),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'rotate keys'), 'estimate', 1),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'rotate keys'), 'noise', 99),
  ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'audit trail'), 'estimate', 4);
sql_insert_temp_task_s3^s3: INSERT INTO tasks(project_id, title, points, status) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code = 'WEB'), 'temporary import', 9, 'todo');
sql_insert_temp_event_s3^s3: INSERT INTO task_events(task_id, kind, delta) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM tasks WHERE title = 'temporary import'), 'estimate', 7);
sql_insert_audit_s3^s3: INSERT INTO task_events(task_id, kind, delta) SELECT id, 'audit', 2 FROM tasks WHERE status = 'done';
sql_update_budget_s3^s3: UPDATE projects SET budget = budget + 15 WHERE code = 'API';
sql_project_rollup_s3^s3:
WITH event_totals AS (
  SELECT task_id, SUM(delta) AS delta_total
  FROM task_events
  GROUP BY task_id
)
SELECT
  a.name,
  p.code,
  p.budget,
  COALESCE(SUM(t.points), 0),
  COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'done' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0),
  COALESCE(SUM(COALESCE(event_totals.delta_total, 0)), 0)
FROM accounts a
JOIN projects p ON p.account_id = a.id
LEFT JOIN tasks t ON t.project_id = p.id
LEFT JOIN event_totals ON event_totals.task_id = t.id
WHERE p.archived = 0
GROUP BY a.name, p.code, p.budget
HAVING COUNT(t.id) > 0
ORDER BY a.name, p.code;
sql_status_snapshot_s3^s3:
SELECT
  p.code,
  t.title,
  t.status,
  CASE WHEN t.status = 'done' THEN 'closed' ELSE 'open' END
FROM tasks t
JOIN projects p ON p.id = t.project_id
WHERE t.points >= 5
ORDER BY p.code, t.title;
sql_metrics_s3^s3:
SELECT value FROM (
  SELECT 1 AS ord, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE status = 'done'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 2 AS ord, COALESCE(SUM(points), 0) AS value FROM tasks
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 3 AS ord, COALESCE(SUM(delta), 0) AS value FROM task_events
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 4 AS ord, COUNT(*) AS value FROM task_events WHERE kind = 'audit'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 5 AS ord, COUNT(*) AS value FROM projects WHERE budget >= 100
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 6 AS ord, COUNT(*) AS value FROM tasks WHERE title = 'temporary import'
) ORDER BY ord;
